society.name: Royal Holloway Engineering Society
society.tagline: Building, tinkering, and connecting engineers at Royal Holloway.
society.description: The Royal Holloway Engineering Society brings together students who are curious about how things are designed, built, and made better. Whether you're studying engineering, physics, computer science, or you just like taking things apart, EngSoc is your home for hands-on projects, industry talks, and a community of people who like to build stuff.
society.mission: We exist to make engineering at Royal Holloway more hands-on, more social, and more connected to industry — through workshops, projects, socials, and talks from working engineers.

highlights.title: Workshops
highlights.description: Regular hands-on sessions covering electronics, CAD, robotics, and more — no experience required.

highlights.title: Industry Talks
highlights.description: Hear from practising engineers about what real-world engineering careers actually look like.

highlights.title: Projects
highlights.description: Team up with other members to build things throughout the year, from small builds to bigger showcase projects.

highlights.title: Socials
highlights.description: Because engineering is more fun with people. Regular socials to meet the rest of the society.

committee.name: Henry Li
committee.bio: Leads the society and sets the direction for the year.

committee.name: TBC
committee.bio: Supports the president and helps run day-to-day operations.

committee.name: TBC
committee.bio: Manages the society's budget, sponsorships, and expenses.

committee.name: TBC
